tasks.title: Enhance User Onboarding UI and Logic in src/features/onboarding/
tasks.description: Modify onboarding components and services in src/features/onboarding/ to allow users to set current IELTS level, target band, exam date, daily study time, weak skills, preferred schedule, and study goal (Academic or General). Implement form validation and friendly UI flow. Update onboarding service to save these settings and trigger roadmap generation.
acceptanceCriteria: User can complete onboarding with all required fields
Onboarding data is saved locally and triggers roadmap update
UI is simple, friendly, and accessible

outputPlan.description: Update onboarding form UI and logic
Update onboarding service to save user profile and trigger roadmap generation

metadata.inputContext: Existing onboarding components and user profile service
evidence: User profile saved with new fields
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides user profile data needed for personalized roadmap and study plan

tasks.title: Implement Personalized IELTS Roadmap System in src/features/roadmap/
tasks.description: Create or enhance roadmap components and services to display learning phases, weekly goals, daily tasks, skill focus, progress status, and recommendations. Roadmap must be personalized based on user profile (target band, exam date, weak skills, progress). Include visual progress indicators and task completion toggles.
acceptanceCriteria: Roadmap shows phases, weekly goals, daily tasks with skill focus
Progress status and completed/incomplete tasks are visible
Roadmap updates dynamically based on user data

outputPlan.description: Add personalized roadmap UI components
Implement roadmap generation logic based on user profile and progress

metadata.inputContext: User profile data from onboarding, existing roadmap components
evidence: Roadmap data reflects user profile and progress
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Delivers personalized learning roadmap guiding daily study tasks

tasks.title: Update Daily Study Dashboard in src/features/dashboard/
tasks.description: Modify dashboard components to clearly show today's study tasks, study progress, current IELTS goal, study streak, weak skill reminders, saved vocabulary, recent mistakes, AI Tutor suggestions, and a prominent continue learning button. Ensure dashboard answers 'What should I study today?' immediately on app open.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays today's tasks and progress clearly
Weak skill reminders and AI Tutor suggestions are visible

outputPlan.description: Enhance dashboard UI with daily tasks and progress widgets
Update dashboard service to aggregate data for display

metadata.inputContext: Roadmap data, user progress, AI Tutor data

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves user clarity on daily study priorities and progress

tasks.title: Develop Daily Task System with Task Detail Pages in src/features/tasks/
tasks.description: Create or improve daily task components and services to support tasks with title, skill type, estimated time, difficulty, learning objective, study content, practice activity, completion status, and review option. Implement task detail pages showing content, practice questions, user answer area, AI help button, complete task button, save notes, and review later options.

outputPlan.description: Update daily task list UI

tasks.title: Integrate Ready-Made Learning Content Library in src/features/content/

tasks.title: Enhance AI Tutor Assistant Logic in src/features/ai-tutor/
